title: Datatilsynet breach reporting

compliance.assurance_rationale: Auto-migrated from cat-22 markdown on Phase 1.3 run, then normalised in Phase A (clause 'Personopplysningsloven' → '§8'). Requires SME review to confirm clause accuracy, mode (satisfies vs detects-violation-of), and assurance level (contributing/partial/full).

dataSources: Windows Security Event Logs, network infrastructure logs, OT/ICS system logs, power grid SCADA, petroleum control systems, government system audit trails, identity management systems, security incident reports
app: Splunk Enterprise Security (263), Splunk Add-on for Microsoft Windows (742), Splunk Add-on for Unix and Linux (833), Splunk OT Security Add-on (5151), Splunk ITSI (1841), Splunk Common Information Model Add-on (1621)
spl:
index=privacy sourcetype="breach:ticket" jurisdiction="NO" earliest=-180d
| eval confirmed=strptime(confirmed_at,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
| eval filed=strptime(datatilsynet_filed_at,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
| eval hours=round((filed-confirmed)/3600,2)
| eval breach_sla=if(isnull(filed) OR hours>72,1,0)
| table breach_id, confirmed_at, datatilsynet_filed_at, hours, breach_sla
value: Tracks breach assessment milestones and Datatilsynet notification timestamps for supervisory evidence.
implementation: (1) Maintain supporting lookups (classified hosts, sectors, transfers) aligned to Norwegian regulatory language. (2) Schedule searches with Europe/Oslo time semantics for reporting cutoffs. (3) Route ES notables to the correct national security, OT, or privacy queues. (4) Quarterly false-positive tuning with HR, operations, and legal stakeholders.
visualization: Bar chart (events by host), Table (top users), Single value (policy violations).
cimSpl: | tstats summariesonly=t count from datamodel=Change.All_Changes by All_Changes.action, All_Changes.object_category, All_Changes.user | sort - count

references.title: Splunk Add-on for Unix and Linux

knownFalsePositives: Administrative tasks, scheduled jobs or platform updates can match this pattern — correlate with change management, maintenance windows and user role before raising severity.
